name: objc-jupyter-wasm
description: Objective-C JupyterLite kernel backed by a WebAssembly smoke ABI

scripts.build: npm run build:lib && npm run build:labextension && npm run build:assets
scripts.check:js: node --check js/wasm-loader.js && node --check js/objc-worker.js && node --check jupyterlite/kernel.js && node --check scripts/copy-static-assets.mjs && node --check scripts/build-smoke-site.mjs && node --check tests/browser-smoke.mjs && node --check tests/browser-smoke-page.mjs && node --check tests/kernel-smoke.mjs
